stemHtml: If an ATC clearance is not suitable to the pilot-in-command of an aircraft, the pilot…

options.a: has to accept the ATC clearance. The clearance is based on the ATC Flight Plan filed.
options.b: may propose another clearance. ATC has to amend the clearance in accordance with the pilot`s request.
options.c: may request an amended clearance. ATC will amend the clearance if practicable.
options.d: may request an amended clearance from ATC. Amended clearances will only be given when VMC prevail.
